title: loxogramme subecostata
intro: Loxogramme subecostata, a type of terrestrial fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Loxogramme subecostata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used topically or orally, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional.
